LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_HEAT.label: Orassan Missile shell (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_HEAT.descriptio: Large projectiles for the orassan recoilless railgun rifle system The lack of propellent allows for larger payloads for their size, effectively allowing infantry to use armaments typically associated with armor.
LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_HE.label: Orassan Missile shell (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_HE.description: Large projectiles for the orassan recoilless railgun rifle system The lack of propellent allows for larger payloads for their size, effectively allowing infantry to use armaments typically associated with armor.
LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_APSabot.label: Orassan Missile shell (AP Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_OrassanMissileShell_APSabot.descrip: Large projectiles for the orassan recoilless railgun rifle system The lack of propellent allows for larger payloads for their size, effectively allowing infantry to use armaments typically associated with armor.
LanguageData.Bullet_OrassanMissileShell_HEAT.label: Orassan Missile shell (HEAT)
LanguageData.Bullet_OrassanMissileShell_APSabot.label: Orassan Missile shell (AP Sabot)
LanguageData.Bullet_OrassanMissileShell_HE.label: Orassan Missile shell (HE)
